description: Configure Docker Compose profiles for the multi-service e-commerce platform located at /home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml. Modify the file to add profiles attributes according to the following requirements: postgres and redis must remain as base services (no profile); nginx and storefront belong to the frontend profile; api and worker belong to the backend profile; test-runner and prometheus belong to the debug profile; and the full profile must include nginx, storefront, api, worker, test-runner, and prometheus. Do not modify existing port mappings, image names, or depends_on relations.
